description_long: This juice bar features a compact, rectangular structure with a glossy purple base and a lighter upper counter area. The countertop is adorned with a colorful assortment of fruit models, juice bottles, and cartons, suggesting a vibrant and fresh offering. Several metallic dispensers or taps are mounted along the back and side, likely for serving juice, while a set of control knobs and a lever are visible on the sides, hinting at interactive functionality. The lower section displays a transparent panel revealing mechanical components, pipes, and a large wheel, giving the bar an industrial flair. A small sign with numbers and a menu-like appearance is positioned on the counter, adding to the commercial feel. The overall design is playful and stylized, with smooth, rounded edges and a clean, modern aesthetic.
description: A compact, glossy purple juice bar with a fruit-laden counter, metallic dispensers, and visible mechanical components in the base. The design is playful, modern, and industrial with interactive knobs and a small menu sign.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main counter with fruit, bottles, and metallic dispensers, as well as prominent control knobs and a lever on the left.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the transparent lower panel with visible mechanical parts, pipes, and a large wheel, plus the full countertop display.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights a small menu sign, additional control panels, and a lever, with the fruit and bottles still visible on the counter.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays multiple metallic dispensers and the side profile of the counter and base, with less detail on the mechanical interior.
attribute_signage: A small rectangular sign with black text '12 III' is placed on the counter, styled simply and clearly visible from the rear view.
attribute_menu_board: A small menu board is present on the counter, featuring a white background with black text, styled in a minimal and modern fashion.
attribute_fruit_display: A variety of colorful fruit models, including apples and citrus, are arranged openly on the countertop, creating a vibrant and inviting display.
attribute_blender_equipment: Multiple metallic dispensers or taps are mounted on the counter, but no explicit blender or juicing machine is visible.
attribute_architectural_style: modern industrial; characterized by a glossy finish, exposed mechanical components, metallic fixtures, and a playful, stylized form.
